programs.title: Rick Stein's Seafood Odyssey
programs.desc: Rick is in Cornwall, where he fries fish and jazzes it up with red curry and steamed jasmine rice.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Seafood Odyssey
programs.desc: Rick visits America, Naples and the UK in Whitby, with good old English fish and chips.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Seafood Lover's Guide

programs.title: Rick Stein's Seafood Lover's Guide
programs.desc: Rick is in Morecambe Bay, and he goes fishing with a local man who owns a fish shop where he pots the shrimps.

programs.title: Rick Stein's Seafood Lover's Guide
